- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements

- [x] Scaffold the Project

- [x] Customize the Project

- [x] Install Required Extensions

- [x] Compile the Project

- [x] Create and Run Task

- [ ] Launch the Project

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

Execution Guidelines
- Track progress with the checklist and mark each step when finished.
- Keep communication concise; share only the necessary command outputs.
- Use the current directory as project root and avoid creating extra folders.
- Add placeholders only when necessary and call them out explicitly.
- Do not install extensions beyond those specified.
- Finish when the project is scaffolded, compiled, documented, and launch steps are clear for the user.
